snippet.description:
ūüĒ• DA BRAVO! Podcast #14 cu Mihai Rait Dragomir ( Dorel ) I Mihai Bobonete podcast
ūüĎČ Subscribe sau aboneaza-te pentru mai mult: https://goo.gl/9gN6Yd
....
ūüŹěÔłŹ "Fiind bńÉiet pńÉduri cutreieram
Ňěi mńÉ culcam ades l√ĘngńÉ izvor,
Iar braŇ£ul drept sub cap eu mi-l puneam
S-aud cum apa sunńÉ-ncetiŇüor:
Un freamńÉt lin trecea din ram √ģn ram
Ňěi un miros venea adormitor.
Astfel ades eu nopŇ£i √ģntregi am mas,
Bl√Ęnd √ģng√Ęnat de-al valurilor glas." 

ūüŹĖÔłŹ Departe de noi si copilaria noastra, nu a dat-o Mihai Eminescu, caci si eu si Mihai am adormit adesea pe malul Dunarii cu bratul sub cap si cate si mai cate n-am facut pe malul acesta plin de viata si de copilarie.

ūü¶Ą In acest episod veti auzi si veti vedea un alt Mihai Rait , nu e Dorel, nu e baiatul de la stand up sau improvizatie, nu e vreo vedeta autohtona, nu...astazi veti vedea doi copii care alearga pe un inorog printre sutele de amintiri frumoase ale adolescentei traite impreuna.

ūüćí Un fel de "Cire»ôarii", un fel de "Coliba Unchiului Tom" , un fel de "Ciulinii Baraganului" , un fel de Robin Hood si putin din "Via»õa la »õara", ce sa mai...serviti cu incredere ca eu atata energie buna n-am mai intalinit pe nicaieri.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Versuri:

Esti o bucata cazuta din rai,
Esti o minune, doar tu poti sa-mi dai, 
Din lumea ta o parte,
Sapte zile din sapte.
Rochie alba, sangria-n pahar,
Gura ta dulce ispita mi-e iar.
Ochii diamante,
Tu ma ghidezi in noapte.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande,
Lipeste ma de inima ta.
Fericire-n secunde,
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Refren:

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Am lasat in urma noastra orasul gol.
Ne-am inchis in lumea noastra in dormitor,
Siluete la fereastra intr-un dans nocturn,
Tu esti noaptea mea albastra,
Esti tot ce am mai bun.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande 
Lipeste ma de inima ta
Fericire-n secunde
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Refren:

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Inima la tine imi zboara,
Cand nu esti ard ca o tigara.
Mai bine stinge-ma cu un sarut.

Inima la tine imi zboara,
Cand nu esti ard ca o tigara.

snippet.title: Eurovision Song Contest 2021 - Grand Final - Live Stream
snippet.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 will take place on 22 May. 26 Acts will perform in the final of which 6 countries are already pre-qualified. This are host country The Netherlands and the so called 'Big 5' consisting of France, Germany, Italy, Spain and the United Kingdom. Ten acts will qualify from the first-Semi-Final and the remaining ten acts will qualify from the Second Semi-Final. 

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

From the life where you got plenty

That I made that jump, that leap of faith
I‚Äôm happy that it all worked out for me

snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.description:
Videoclip oficial pentru single-ul "Dominicana", semnat Gabi Bagu si Matteo. (C) 2021 Mattman Music / 8th Note / Roton Music

Matteo's Online World:
Official Site: http://www.matteomusic.ro‚Äč
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MatteoMusic‚Äč
Instagram: https://instagram.com/yesiammatteo‚Äč

Muzica: Matei-Anton Vasiliu, Florina-Lorena Stoian
Text: Eduard Furfurica, Matei-Anton Vasiliu, Florina-Lorena Stoian 
Producer: Just A Gemeni
Editori: Mattman Music Publishing, 8th Note Publishing, Roton Music Publishing

-------

VERSURI

Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Sa ma feresc, sa fug de tine mi-a zis si mama

Ma trezesc cu mirosul de cafea
Eu o trezesc doar cu iubirea mea
Nu iesim din dormitor, 
Nici in noapte, nici in zori
Ne privesc, ar vrea sa se termine
Vor si ele sa faca ce faci tu cu mine
Dar mai bine imi convine 
Sa rupa toate hainele de pe mine


Ochi straini ce m-ar gusta 
Mie imi place aroma ta


Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Sa ma feresc, sa fug de tine mi-a zis si mama
Cand isi misca formele, 
O vorbesc de rau si fostele
Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana

Dominicana

4 x Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana 

Mainile pe solduri, urechile pe-acorduri
Nu furam, Tibi, draga, ca ne fura somnul
Da-i Cuba cu lemon, imi zice sa sunt champion
Vocea ei sigur o sa mi-o pun ca ringtone
Ce beton ne miscam pe reggaeton
Suntem in sincron parca legati cu cordon
Cine mai doarme la noapte
Cand e treaz fiecare hormon


Ochi straini ce m-ar gusta
Mie imi place aroma ta


Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Sa ma feresc, sa fug de tine mi-a zis si mama
Cand isi misca formele,
O vorbesc de rau si fostele
Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana

Dominicana

Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la ea


2 x Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana

Dominicana

-------

snippet.title: Despre sinceritate cu Gina Pistol, DOC, Deliric - 8, 8 si ceva, FIX, cu Smiley
snippet.description:
In emisiunea de astazi vom vorbim despre sinceritate. E o discutie in care am ras mult, am injurat si am vorbit despre nevestele altora cu doi dintre cei mai cunoscuti filosofi in trening contemporani, DOC si Deliric, iar prin telefon, corespondenta mea speciala de acasa, Gina Pistol.
8, 8 si ceva, FIX, cu Smiley - O emisiune social-educativa, in care discutam subiecte importante intr-o maniera relaxata, alaturi de o bautura pregatita de Nur.

Reteta bauturii de azi:
Cocktail "Old Fashioned"

60 ml whiskey
2 buc zahar brun
5 ml apa 
2 picńÉturi Angustura bitters
1 bucata de gheata

Vizionare placuta!

‚Ė∂ Like/Share/Comment  ūüĎć
Nu uita sa dai subscribe ūüĒĒ

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max. 

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook

snippet.title: Israel Unrest: Hamas launches rocket attack on Tel Aviv
snippet.description:
Tensions between Israel and Hamas have further escalated, with Hamas firing 130 rockets towards the city of Tel Aviv.

Health officials in Gaza said 28 Palestinians, including nine children, had been killed in Israeli airstrikes.

To read more on how the attacks started: https://news.sky.com/story/israel-hamas-launches-rocket-attack-on-tel-aviv-12303773

snippet.title: DA BRAVO! Podcast #12 cu Dani O»õil
snippet.description:
DA BRAVO! Podcast #12 cu Dani O»õil I Mihai Bobonete podcast
ūüĎČ Subscribe sau aboneaza-te pentru mai mult: https://goo.gl/9gN6Yd

ūüĒ• 06:30 povestea semnelor din frunte, coltul din dreapta sus
ūüĒ• 10:04 a baut din biberon pana la 6 ani si adormea doar daca se juca la urechea mamei. De la 12 ani a dormit cu frate-su‚Äô si a renuntat la gestul cu urechea
ūüĒ• 12:25 continua povestea inceputa de Razvan: cum am stricat bara de streptease. Zice ca si Loredana are in sufragerie 
ūüĒ• 13:15 ce ar face daca ar fi pentru o zi presedinte
ūüĒ• 16:44 poveste cu Mihaela Radulescu in Mikonos, dar mai poveste cu maseorul Romario. Babaiatule, n-ai auzit asa ceva ‚Ä¶
ūüĒ• 25:00 cum a ajuns Sergiu Nicolaescu in platou la Neatza, el fiind invitat la TVR 
ūüĒ• 29:35 despre calitatile lui Razvan
ūüĒ• 33:15 continuarea povestii mele cu vaca Fulga si paralela cu Daniela Crudu vs Mickey Mouse
ūüĒ• 34:45 care ar fi ultima masa daca ar muri maine. Ar vrea sa-i cante Vali Vijelie: Nevasta te-as intreba!
ūüĒ• 42:02 intrebarea lui Magi Robert Tudor ūüėā
ūüĒ• 45:30 a stat in bloc cu Alina Plugaru. Dilema ‚Ä¶
ūüĒ• 48:08 despre labagiul de la Radio Vest Timisoara. Zice ca sexul poate fi programat
ūüĒ• 51:38 Povestea de senzatie cu Roxanuta. N-ati auzit pana acum asa ceva  ‚Ä¶ ūüėāūüėāūüėā
ūüĒ• 01:06:10 Ce gen de tata va fi. De ce si-a poreclit baiatul C√Ęrcel
ūüĒ• 01:13:13 Produce spoturi. Care este cel mai interesant proiect al lui
ūüĒ• 01:15:40 Intrebarile rapide: ai vazut ce craci are Simona Halep in rochie?
ūüĒ• 01:17:05 Jucaria
ūüĒ• 01:19:04 Ce a scris pe masa la final

....
Contact management & booking:
ūüĎČ  Madalina Lazar: 0722329263 
....

snippet.title: Israeli Iron Dome filmed intercepting rockets from Gaza
snippet.description:
Sirens blared in the coastal Israeli city of Ashkelon as the Iron Dome missile defence system intercepted rockets in the sky.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Despite having a high rate of success the system doesn't stop every attack and rockets fired from Gaza killed two women in Asheklon.

For the latest on Israel please visit: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/israel/

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

#israel #gaza #ashkelon

snippet.title: Journalist reports live from Gaza as neighbouring building hit by Israel airstrike
snippet.description:
An Israeli airstrike struck a high-rise building in central Gaza City as journalist Youmna Al Sayed reported live for Al Jazeera from a neighbouring building. Al Sayed continued to provide commentary despite being forced to move away from the camera by the explosions. The targeted building housed businesses in addition to offices for Hamas' Al-Aqsa satellite channel and is located in one of the busiest streets of Gaza's Roman neighbourhood. The airstrike is part of continued violence between Israel and Palestinian militants that is the most serious conflict between the parties since 2014 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Hamas sends rockets deeper into Israel after Gaza airstrikes as crisis spirals¬†‚Ėļ https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/may/13/israel-gaza-airstrikes-rockets-hamas

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today ‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

snippet.title: Watch the moment an Israeli air strike hits the Associated Press and Al-Jazeera offices in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israeli air strikes destroyed a¬†Gaza high-rise housing international media offices on Saturday, in an attack The Associated Press described as¬†the latest step by the military to silence reporting from the territory.

The strike on Jala Tower came as¬†the militant group Hamas intensified rocket fire from the besieged enclave towards Tel Aviv¬†after a night in which Israeli air strikes killed¬†at least 10 members of one family in a Gaza refugee camp, the deadliest strike since hostilities erupted earlier this week.

Read more: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/05/15/death-toll-rises-violence-rocks-gaza-israel-west-bank/

snippet.title: Andy Popescu - On Top (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Namaste ūüôŹūüŹĽ Please leave your comment below and I promise I will reply to it if you write it in Englishūü§ó

Mi-ar placea sa stiu  parerea voastra despre acest clip, asa ca puteti apasa acum butonul de LIKE sau DISLIKE.
Un comentariu mai jos m-ar ajuta, pentru ca stiind parerea voastra ma pot imbunatati.
Datorita voua aceasta melodie are un bass pronuntat, pentru ca in urma trailerului am primit sute de mesaje de la voi ca va doriti mai mult bass pe melodie, si atunci am facut asta pentru voi, sunt convins ca il veti aprecia pentru ca voi l-ati cerut. Diferenta intre CRITICA CONSTRUCTIVA si HATE este ca hate-ul are in el o jignire. 
Eu apreciez mult critica constructiva, asa ca este foarte ok sa ma criticati, dar nu apreciez oamenii care jignesc.
Asa cum am spus, critica constructiva ma ajuta mult sa ma imbunatatesc, pe cand jignirea (hate-ul) nu face decat sa arate ca omul care arunca cu noroi e plin de frustrari. Un om fericit si multumit cu viata lui niciodata nu ar fi rautacios si nu ar jigni.
Fiecare om are dreptul la o opinie si imi place mult sa citesc parerile voastre. Singura problema intervine cand oamenii nu inteleg ce inseamna o jignire si au impresia ca eu vreau doar lauda. Nu, nu vreau lauda, stiu deja dinainte sa lansez acest clip ca videoclipul este mai misto ca piesa, si stiu ca urmatoarea melodie, "Hai Sus", va fi mai buna. Stiu dinainte sa lansez melodia ca vor fi oameni deranjati de atitudinea personajului din clip, in special de faptul ca nu inteleg diferenta dintre un rol in videoclip si viata reala. Voi continua cu muzica dar si cu vlogurile cu care v-am obisnuit, si cel mai important, voi aplica principiul de viata despre care am vorbit in atatea vloguri: Imbunatatirea continua. Multumim pentru sprijin Politiei Romane pentru inchiderea strazii. Retineti si faceti diferenta intre un drift intr-un spatiu necirculat si driftul printre masini. Ne vedem mai jos la comentarii. Multumesc.

Versuri / Lyrics 

Let met touch you (x3) brown skin
Your perfume makes me want you more than everything 
You can be my pain and also you can be my remedy
Everything you want to do to me I will agree
I can make the money, sure
I can make more than you know
You can be the money lover
You can be my baby now
We can be the ones to show
We can be the ones to GO
We can be the ones, to decide everything NOW

Stop! I want you on TOP
But baby Don't STOP ūüõĎ 
This ain't a Trap YEAHHH
Stop! Give me, give me Don't STOP
Oh I'll give it to you, tap
Never, let you, let you down
Cuz I want it non stop (x2) 

1,2,3,4,5 if you're real man (x3) 
Never let it down 
The story will never end

Give it to me baby yeahhh- I like you when you have the flow
Give me what I need, yeah and
Give me what you want
Give it to my baby morning
I can see you when you go
Give to my baby comin coming on the row

I can make the money, sure
I can make more than you know
You can be the money lover
You can be my baby now
We can be the one to show
We can be the ones to GO
We can be the ones to decide everything NOW


https://www.AndyPopescu.ro
Instagram: AndyPopescuVlogs
Facebook: Andy Popescu (follow ca am deja 5000 friends)
Email: ace20male@gmail.com

Multumesc.

snippet.title: The Weeknd - Save Your Tears (Live at The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
‚ÄúSave Your Tears‚ÄĚ (Live at The BRIT Awards 2021) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD‚Äč ‚Äč

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye

I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away

You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care

I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time

I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay

Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better

Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)

I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Future Nostalgia Medley (Live at the BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #BRITAwards2021
Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-KZfRV8c13fOCkhXdLiQ?sub_confirmation=1

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaoXT_LJuwEyESQlctWNDCwD

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLNrotoZZ8BaouNABcO_A9Xkn_Nkz0PT11

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

snippet.title: UN warns of ‚Äúfull-scale war‚ÄĚ as Israel-Palestinian violence intensifies - BBC News
snippet.description:
The United Nations is warning of the risk of "full-scale war" as the clashes between Israeli forces and Palestinians continue.

Israel's Prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, warned Palestinian militants that this was just the beginning, threatening to strike with ‚Äúblows they haven't dreamed of‚ÄĚ.  

The United States is sending a senior diplomat to the Middle East to urge Israelis and Palestinians to end the violence. 

At least 65 Palestinians including 15 children and six Israelis are reported to have been killed since the fighting began.

In the past few days Palestinian militants have fired barrages of rockets  into Israel, many aimed at Tel Aviv. Israel has carried out a heavy bombardment of Gaza launching hundreds of air strikes. 

Tensions have been growing in Jerusalem, partly due to a long-running threat to evict Palestinians from their homes in occupied East Jerusalem in an area claimed by Jewish settlers. 

Sophie Raworth presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Tom Bateman in Jerusalem, Rushdi Abualouf in Gaza and Caroline Hawley.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: TRUE Limits Of Humanity ‚Äď The Final Border We Will Never Cross
snippet.description:
If you want to support kurzgesagt and get something beautiful in return check our shop:
https://bit.ly/3dRJj71

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-truelimitsofhumanity/

The original Limits of Humanity: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZL4yYHdDSWs

Is there a border we will never cross? Are there places we will never reach, no matter how hard we try? It turns out, there are. Even with sci-fi technology, we are trapped in a limited pocket of the Universe and the finite stuff within it. How much universe is there for us and how far can we go?

snippet.title: MOTOVLOGGER ROMAN IN COMA
snippet.description:
Clipul acesta nu as fi vrut sa fiu nevoit sa il filmez. E un clip greu si as putea spune dureros, dar tot ce am spus, a fost din inima si din dorinta de a schimba ceva.  Ceea ce fac reprezinta pasiunea mea si imi aduce multe momente de bucurie, dar totul vine cu riscuri. Poate prea mari uneori. 
Din pacate, cei care aleg sa faca asta nu le constientizeaza si pretul platit este mult prea mare. As fi vrut sa vin catre voi cu o poveste frumoasa, insa este nevoie si de astfel de cuvinte. Sunteti comunitatea mea si oamenii alaturi de care sincer am impartasit totul.
As vrea sa cred ca ceea ce am spus va deschide ochii unora dintre voi si vor incerca sa fie cel mai bun exemplu pentru ceea ce stiu ei ca reprezinta. Am incredere ca oamenii sunt buni in esenta, insa in viteza cu care lumea si social media se schimba, se prea poate sa ne ratacim uneori. 
E normal, se intampla. Dar tine de noi sa ne ridicam deasupra oricarei forme de ura si invidie si epatare. Suntem cu totii mai buni de atat.

Poti sustine canalul devenind membru: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCG5O7HXNN_dKsgD22GoiGFw/join
Sau pe Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/MotorBike27

Business inquiries & Contact: motorbike277@gmail.com

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Motor.Bike27
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/MotorBike27/

Track: Sub Urban - Cradles [NCS Release]
Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds.
Watch: https://youtu.be/Hn4sfC2PbhI
Free Download / Stream: http://ncs.io/CradlesYO
#MotorBike27 #Motovlogger #Bucuresti
